mapper.select: SELECT SETTING_CODE_ID, GROUP_NAME, SETTING_NAME, DEFAULT_YN, USE_YN, USER_ID FROM SETTING_CODE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY GROUP_NAME, SETTING_CODE_ID
SELECT SETTING_CODE_ID, GROUP_NAME, SETTING_NAME, DEFAULT_YN, USE_YN, USER_ID FROM SETTING_CODE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND GROUP_NAME = #{groupName} ORDER BY SETTING_CODE_ID
SELECT SETTING_CODE_ID, GROUP_NAME, SETTING_NAME, DEFAULT_YN, USE_YN, USER_ID FROM SETTING_CODE WHERE SETTING_CODE_ID = #{settingCodeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SETTING_CODE ( SETTING_CODE_ID, GROUP_NAME, SETTING_NAME, DEFAULT_YN, USE_YN, USER_ID ) VALUES ( SETTING_CODE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{groupName}, #{settingName}, #{defaultYn}, #{useYn}, #{userId} )
